channel.title: Rashid Blog
channel.description: Articles on web development, game dev with Three.js, AI integration, and open-source projects.

item.title: Aurora Backgrounds and Glassmorphism with Pure CSS
item.description: A dark, themeable design system built from CSS custom properties, animated gradient orbs, and backdrop-filter glass — no images required.

item.title: Building a Game AI Agent in Vanilla JavaScript
item.description: A finite state machine plus utility scoring gives a farming-game bot that plants, waters, harvests, and sells on its own.

item.title: Clean Architecture in Flutter: Layers That Scale
item.description: Separating presentation, domain, and data in a Flutter app so it stays testable and easy to change as it grows.

item.title: Fine-Tuning LLMs with LoRA: A Practical Walkthrough
item.description: What low-rank adapters are, why they cut memory cost dramatically, and how I train, merge, and ship a custom language model.

item.title: Adding a Real Backend to a Static Site with Supabase
item.description: Contact forms, a content vault, and Row Level Security on a static site — using Supabase and Postgres without running a server.

item.title: Building a PWA with Service Workers: Offline-First in Plain JavaScript
item.description: How I made my portfolio installable and offline-capable using a Service Worker, cache strategies, and a web app manifest — no frameworks.

item.title: Building KingCraft: A 3D Voxel Game in the Browser
item.description: How I built a Minecraft-like voxel game using Three.js with chunk-based rendering, block physics, and keyboard controls.

item.title: Portfolio Optimization: From 72 to 85 in One Day
item.description: How I optimized a portfolio site with WebP images, SEO structured data, accessibility fixes, and performance tuning.
